subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-12-31 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: If we--all the Baha'is--who are beneath the shade of the Sadrat-ul-Montaha, arise to teach the Cause of God, unquestionably the Almighty will confirm us.
subcodes.first_line_orig: اگر ماها جمیع احباء که در ظل سدره منتهی هستیم در تبلیغ قیام کنیم حق جل جلاله
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @spiritual transformation, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
